scripts.lint: pnpm prepare:contracts && pnpm -r --if-present lint && uv run --project services/ai ruff check services/ai
scripts.typecheck: pnpm prepare:contracts && pnpm -r --if-present typecheck && uv run --project services/ai mypy services/ai/src
scripts.test: pnpm prepare:contracts && pnpm -r --if-present test && uv run --project services/ai pytest services/ai/tests
